---
title: "Severity explorer"
---

## Interactive severity explorer

This page will later become an interactive calculator.

The planned version will allow readers to change:

- observed estimate;
- standard error;
- degrees of freedom;
- hypothetical overcharge claim;
- direction of the test;
- significance threshold.

The page will then return:

- the severity probability;
- a short verbal interpretation;
- a figure showing the observed estimate, uncertainty, hypothetical claim, and severity area.

::: {.placeholder-figure}
Placeholder for future interactive severity calculator.
:::

## Static examples for now

| Observed estimate | Standard error | Hypothetical claim | Interpretation |
|---:|---:|---:|---|
| 1.0% | 1.5% | 5.0% | Large effects may still be plausible if uncertainty is high. |
| 1.0% | 0.5% | 5.0% | A large effect may be difficult to reconcile with a precise low estimate. |
| 4.0% | 1.0% | 5.0% | The observed estimate may be broadly consistent with the hypothetical claim. |

## Technical note

Because this website is hosted on GitHub Pages, the interactive version should be implemented as a static client-side tool, for example using JavaScript or Observable JS inside Quarto. A Shiny app would require a separate server.
